quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
quotes.author: Tim Ferriss

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: Small progress is still progress.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Son.
quotes.author: Subhas

quotes.text: Discipline is doing what needs to be done even when you don’t feel like it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Dream big. Start small. Act now.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Consistency beats motivation.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Make it happen. Shock everyone.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Don’t quit. Suffer now and live the rest of your life as a champion.
quotes.author: Muhammad Ali

quotes.text: Your only limit is your mind.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Work hard in silence, let success make the noise.
quotes.author: Frank Ocean

quotes.text: You don’t have to be extreme, just consistent.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
quotes.author: Arthur Ashe

quotes.text: Action is the foundational key to success.
quotes.author: Pablo Picasso

quotes.text: Great things never come from comfort zones.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Progress, not perfection.
quotes.author: Unknown

riddles.question: What has to be broken before you can use it?
I’m tall when I’m young, and I’m short when I’m old. What am I?
What has hands but can’t clap?
What gets wetter the more it dries?
What has a neck but no head, two arms but no hands?
What has one eye but can’t see?
What is full of holes but still holds water?
What has a face and two hands but no arms or legs?
What begins with T, ends with T, and has T in it?
What has keys but can’t open locks?
What can travel around the world while staying in one corner?
What gets bigger the more you take away?
What has legs but doesn’t walk?
What has an eye but cannot see?
What has a heart that doesn’t beat?
What comes once in a minute, twice in a moment, but never in a thousand years?

wellnessTasks: Look away from the screen for 20 seconds 👀
Stand up and walk for a minute 🚶
Take a short break from your phone 📵
Close your eyes and breathe slowly 🌿
Write one thing you’re grateful for ✍️
Sit straight and fix your posture 🪑
Take a mindful breath and relax 😌
Blink slowly to relax your eyes 👁️
